rules.h1_h2: Never use default font weights for headings. Use font-light (300) with tracking-tighter for a sophisticated, editorial tech feel, OR font-black (900) for massive structural impact. Max size text-5xl.
rules.body: Use Inter text-sm or text-xs for high-density tables. leading-tight.
rules.data: Use JetBrains Mono for ALL numbers, currency, percentages, and tickers. Apply tracking-tight and text-right for numeric columns.
rules.overline: Uppercase, text-xs, tracking-[0.2em] for widget headers and AI panel labels.

colors.rules: No pure black (#000000). No gradient backgrounds on surfaces. Use solid backgrounds with 1px borders for a sharp, technical 'Bloomberg Terminal' aesthetic. Semantic colors must be tested for APCA contrast against #121418.

grids_and_layouts.philosophy: High Information Density. The user is an analyst, not a casual consumer. Do not waste space.
grids_and_layouts.spacing_scale: p-2, p-3, p-4 (inside widgets). Avoid p-8+ inside data views.

global_layout.sidebar: w-16 to w-64 (collapsible), fixed left, border-r.
global_layout.header: h-14, fixed top, border-b, backdrop-blur-md bg-[#090A0C]/80.

grids_and_layouts.dashboard_grid: grid-cols-12. gap-4. Widgets span col-span-3, col-span-4, col-span-6, or col-span-12. Use masonry or dense grid-auto-flow if needed.
grids_and_layouts.bento_rules: Avoid equal squares. Mix tall lists (row-span-2) with wide charts (col-span-8). Every pixel must be utilized.

surfaces_and_borders.card_style: Flat Solid. bg-[#121418] border border-[#22262E]. NO shadows (shadows are invisible in dark mode anyway).
surfaces_and_borders.radius: rounded-md (max 6px). We want sharp, analytical edges, not bubbly consumer apps.
surfaces_and_borders.glassmorphism: Only use for sticky headers or dropdown menus (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#090A0C]/70 border border-white/10). Do not use for data cards.

component_guidelines.ai_panels: Every AI panel must use Shadcn Tabs. TabsList must be border-b border-[#22262E] with transparent background, TabTrigger active state should have an orange or indigo bottom border. Tabs: Summary, Evidence, Sources, Confidence, Assumptions.
component_guidelines.tables: Dense. py-2 px-3 cells. border-b border-[#22262E]. JetBrains Mono for data columns. Hover state: bg-[#1C1F26].
component_guidelines.badges: For tickers (e.g., AAPL): border border-[#22262E] bg-transparent text-white rounded px-1.5 py-0.5 text-xs.
component_guidelines.search: CMD+K palette must be heavily styled. Dark blurred backdrop, crisp borders, JetBrains mono hints.
component_guidelines.knowledge_graph: Use React Flow. Nodes should follow the card_style (bg-panel, 1px border). Edges should be muted lines (#4B5563).

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive rows and buttons must transition instantly or very fast (duration-150). Change background lightness or add a 1px border highlight.
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Use subtle text color shifts (muted to primary) and border color shifts. No bouncy animations.
motion_and_interactions.loaders: Replace spinners with ASCII-style loaders or sequential data-loading text ('Fetching sources...', 'Calculating confidence...').

3d_and_visual_enhancers.charts: Use Recharts or Shadcn Charts. Line charts must have thin bright lines (strokeWidth={1.5}) and subtle gradient fills (opacity 0.1).
3d_and_visual_enhancers.accents: Use a 1px 'Tracing Beam' or glowing top border (border-t-orange-500) on active/selected widgets to draw the eye.

backgrounds.description: Dark geometric background for auth pages or hero sections

icons.usage: Use 16px (w-4 h-4) icons for dense dashboard layouts. Stroke width 1.5 or 2.

instructions_to_main_agent.1: You must implement a strict dark theme default. Configure Tailwind config with the custom colors provided.
instructions_to_main_agent.2: Create a robust layout wrapper with a collapsible Left Sidebar and Top Nav. Implement routing for: Command Center, Markets, Companies, Portfolio, Research, AI Agents, Screeners, Documents, Alerts, Knowledge Graph, Team, Settings.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: Every AI panel must be built as a reusable component using Shadcn Tabs (Summary, Evidence, Sources, Confidence, Assumptions).
instructions_to_main_agent.4: Use JetBrains Mono for ALL tabular financial data, metrics, and stock tickers. Ensure correct text-alignment (right for numbers).
instructions_to_main_agent.5: Do not center align application wrappers. Left-align dense data.
instructions_to_main_agent.6: Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements.
instructions_to_main_agent.7: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural bento grid layouts; strictly use Shadcn for interactive pieces (selects, modals, tabs).
instructions_to_main_agent.8: Use Recharts or Shadcn Charts for visualizing market data and Portfolio allocation. Apply the dark mode semantic colors.
instructions_to_main_agent.9: Install and configure `reactflow` for the Knowledge Graph UI.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and subtle borders, rather than drop shadows.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) ONLY on overlays, popovers, and sticky headers.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons. Use Lucide icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions. Static = dead.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
